name: SILVER BULL RESOURCES, INC.
business: Silver Bull Resources, Inc. is an exploration stage company engaged in the business of mineral exploration. Its primary objective is to define sufficient mineral reserves on the Sierra Mojada Property in Mexico to justify the development of a mechanized mining operation. The company has not established any mineral reserves and has no revenue-producing activities.

exposures.sentence: Silver Bull, incorporated in Nevada, is an exploration stage company, engaged in the business of mineral exploration.

catalysts.event: ICSID final ruling on arbitration claim against Mexico
catalysts.sentence: The tribunal is expected to render its final ruling as soon as practicable.
